description.value:
Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 10 (Spell Level 5)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 25 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

As Shou-Mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Limit Gate, improving the bonuses to +8 Strength and Dexterity, and +30 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signature increases by two steps and can no longer be suppressed. The temporary Chakra gained increases to 16.

The damage you take increases to 6 damage per round. The save DC increases to 25, and you become exhausted until 30 minutes after the encounter ends on a failed save instead. The penalty to ability scores increases to -4.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 5 per round, and reduced the penalty to ability scores after use to -2.
